prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科/物理类最低位次分别为约19093→21019→25264→24620→26787名，整体呈明显后移趋势，近4年累计后移约7700名；2025年基准位次约26787名，较2024年继续后移约2167名，竞争持续加剧；该校在贵州省理科/物理类招生计划2021–2025年分别为113→113→112→113→115人，2026年计划115人，与2025年持平，无扩缩招影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名2021年第162→2022年第146→2023年第142→2024年第134→2025年第141→2026年第134，近年排名稳中有升，整体处于全国中游211水平；2022年声誉中性/混合，投档线呈逐年下降趋势；2023年偏正面（食堂服务获好评）；2026年声誉文件未收录该校，无明显负面舆情。抖音热度排名第86位，评价为“一般”，综合热度225003，短视频曝光量处于211院校中下水平，报考关注度平稳。历史投档异常方面，2022年曾出现投档线逐年下降信号，属中关注度；第五轮学科评估：畜牧学A、作物学A-，为该校核心优势学科；对应招生专业包括动物科学、动物医学、动植物检疫、农学、种子科学与工程等，对农林类考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及其自动化（2024年高热推荐）、数据科学与大数据技术（推荐）等热门专业在该校均有招生，社会热度较高；农林类专业整体社会热度平稳。贵州省2026年普通高考总人数约299000人，较2025年总人数（物理类207171+历史类90087=297258）略有增加；按近年物理类占比约63%估算，2026年物理类考生约188370人，较2025年物理类207171人减少约9%，考生规模缩小使竞争压力略有缓解。；四川农业大学位于四川省成都市，与贵州省毗邻，对贵州考生具有地域接近性和生活习惯相似性优势；该校在贵州招生计划占比较稳定，近年维持在115人左右，属省外招生规模较大的院校之一。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年招生计划与2025年持平、贵州省物理类考生规模缩小约9%使竞争略有缓解、学校软科排名稳中有升等因素，在2025年基准位次26787名基础上，预计2026年最低录取位次小幅前移（更易进）。预测最低位次约26587名，区间26087–27087名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science/physics category were approximately 19093 → 21019 → 25264 → 24620 → 26787, showing a clear downward trend, with a cumulative decline of about 7700 positions over the past 4 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 26787, continuing to decline by about 2167 positions compared to 2024, indicating intensifying competition; the university's enrollment plan in Guizhou for science/physics category from 2021 to 2025 was 113 → 113 → 112 → 113 → 115, with the 2026 plan at 115, unchanged from 2025, with no impact from expansion or reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; Soft Science main ranking from 2021: 162 → 2022: 146 → 2023: 142 → 2024: 134 → 2025: 141 → 2026: 134, showing a steady upward trend in recent years, overall at the mid-level of national 211 universities; in 2022, reputation was neutral/mixed, with admission scores showing a year-on-year decline; in 2023, reputation was slightly positive (cafeteria service received praise); the 2026 reputation file did not include this university, with no significant negative public opinion. Douyin popularity ranking: 86th, rated as 'average', with a comprehensive popularity of 225003, short video exposure at the lower-middle level among 211 universities, indicating stable application attention. Historical admission anomalies: in 2022, there was a signal of year-on-year decline in admission scores, classified as medium attention; fifth round of discipline evaluation: Animal Science A, Crop Science A-, which are the university's core advantageous disciplines; corresponding enrollment majors include Animal Science, Veterinary Medicine, Animal and Plant Quarantine, Agronomy, Seed Science and Engineering, etc., which are highly attractive to agriculture and forestry candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation (highly recommended in 2024) and Data Science and Big Data Technology (recommended) are offered at this university, with high social popularity; agriculture and forestry majors overall have stable social popularity. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Guizhou Gaokao is approximately 299,000, slightly increased from the 2025 total (physics category 207,171 + history category 90,087 = 297,258); based on the recent physics category proportion of about 63%, the estimated number of physics category candidates in 2026 is about 188,370, a decrease of about 9% from 207,171 in 2025, which slightly eases competition pressure due to the smaller candidate pool. Sichuan Agricultural University is located in Chengdu, Sichuan Province, adjacent to Guizhou Province, offering regional proximity and lifestyle similarity advantages for Guizhou candidates; the university's enrollment plan in Guizhou is relatively stable, maintaining around 115 in recent years, making it one of the larger out-of-province enrollment institutions.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous downward trend in historical rankings, the 2026 enrollment plan unchanged from 2025, the approximately 9% reduction in Guizhou physics category candidates slightly easing competition, and the steady upward trend in Soft Science rankings, based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 26787, the minimum admission ranking for 2026 is expected to slightly move upward (easier to enter). Predicted minimum ranking: approximately 26587, with a range of 26087–27087.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking: approximately 26587, range 26087–27087. If your ranking is within the range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 26000), you can focus on aiming for popular engineering majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation and Data Science and Big Data Technology; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 27000), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 majors, while also considering lower-ranking Tier 2 majors such as Forestry and Food Science and Engineering.
